blended.narrative: Mt. Baker is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,599 ft. Looking ahead, 36 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 80".
